headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund slumped to a 2-1 defeat to visitors VfB Stuttgart on Saturday in a disappointing debut for new coach Niko Kovac.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund defeated in Kovac's first game in charge

video.headline: Julian Chabot scores goal for VfB Stuttgart
